expectations.text: Gathers project context silently first (reads CLAUDE.md, package.json, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 mentions reading CLAUDE.md, package.json, specs/ directory, project structure

expectations.text: Asks clarifying questions about the existing tech stack and design system
expectations.evidence: Questions about CSS framework, design tokens, scope, and system preference

expectations.text: Writes a spec to specs/dark-mode.md or similar descriptive filename
Spec addresses persistence mechanism (localStorage, cookie, or system preference)
expectations.evidence: 'localStorage for simplicity' and 'System preference detection' mentioned

expectations.text: Includes an explicit approval gate - waits for user sign-off before coding
expectations.evidence: Phase 4 approval gate: 'reply Approved to start implementation'
